headlines.text: Iran sends ceasefire response to Pakistan as US-Iran tanker strikes continue in Strait of Hormuz
Hantavirus cruise ship MV Hondius arrives in Tenerife; evacuations underway this morning
Supreme Court ruling opens new era of partisan gerrymandering, redistricting race begins
Trump's approval rating hits 37% — worst of either term — as gas prices top $4.52/gallon
Nasdaq and S&P 500 close at all-time highs Friday on strong jobs report and AI optimism
Hungary's Viktor Orban out: Peter Magyar sworn in as new prime minister
Trump announces Russia-Ukraine 3-day ceasefire May 9-11 with 1,000-prisoner swap
Netflix Roast of Kevin Hart streams live tonight, hosted by Shane Gillis at Kia Forum
Ted Turner, CNN founder and conservationist, dies at 87
Frontier Airlines jet strikes and kills pedestrian on runway at Denver International Airport

breaking.text: BREAKING: MV Hondius hantavirus cruise ship passengers begin disembarking in Tenerife this morning — 3 dead, 8 cases confirmed. Repatriation flights departing now.

stories.hed: Iran Sends Ceasefire Response Via Pakistan as US Fires on Tankers
stories.dek: Iran finally responded to the US peace proposal — through Pakistani mediators, naturally, because why use a phone. Meanwhile the US Navy shot up two Iranian tankers for violating the blockade, which is either a pressure tactic or a very loud diplomatic typo.

stories.hed: Hantavirus Cruise Ship Arrives in Tenerife; Passengers Evacuated by Nationality in Small Boats
stories.dek: The MV Hondius docked in the Canary Islands this morning after a weeks-long ordeal with three deaths and eight confirmed or suspected hantavirus cases aboard. WHO chief Tedros flew in personally to oversee the operation and told locals, very reassuringly, that this is 'not another COVID.'

stories.hed: Supreme Court Gerrymandering Ruling Triggers Redistricting Sprint in Multiple States
stories.dek: The Supreme Court ruled that voting districts can no longer be drawn along racial lines but can be shaped by partisan aims, setting off a dash to redraw maps in Tennessee, Virginia, and beyond. Democrats say it's a democracy killer; Republicans say it is called winning.

stories.hed: Trump Approval Hits Record Low 37% as Gas Prices, Iran War Weigh on Voters
stories.dek: A new NPR/PBS/Marist poll shows Trump at 37% approval — his worst mark of either term — with 63% of Americans blaming him for surging gas prices caused by the Iran war. Democrats are cautiously optimistic, which for them is basically a victory lap.

stories.hed: Analysis: Trump Is Not Getting What He Wanted From the Iran War
stories.dek: CNN notes that Trump once demanded 'UNCONDITIONAL SURRENDER' from Iran and is now quietly negotiating a deal that looks nothing like that. Turns out 'one big glow coming out of Iran' and a Pakistani-mediated framework agreement are two very different things.

markets.context: S&P 500 and Nasdaq closed at all-time records Friday as a blowout April jobs report (115,000 jobs vs. 65,000 expected) and strong tech earnings overpowered fresh Strait of Hormuz skirmishes; oil fell sharply on ceasefire hopes.

gas.note: Gas is up 53% since the Iran war started Feb. 28 — your wallet is basically a war casualty.

popCulture.hed: Netflix Roasts Kevin Hart Live Tonight — Shane Gillis Hosts at the Kia Forum
popCulture.dek: Kevin Hart spent years holding the mic at other people's roasts, including Tom Brady's in 2024, and tonight the tables turn as Shane Gillis leads the charge at the Kia Forum in Inglewood. It's the marquee finale of Netflix Is a Joke Fest 2026, and the internet is already drafting short jokes.

genZ.definition: Now several episodes deep into its Prime Video run, The Boys Season 5 has shifted from premiere hype to chaotic mid-season meme territory, with character reaction threads, hot takes, and plot-based formats flooding TikTok under #TheBoysS5. The show's eerily on-the-nose political satire is hitting different in 2026.
genZ.usage: Iran war ceasefire talks collapsing every 48 hours is giving major The Boys Season 5 energy — nobody has a plan, everyone has a monologue.

tldr: On Mother's Day 2026, a hantavirus cruise ship is offloading passengers in the Canary Islands, Iran sent a peace proposal response through Pakistan while the US Navy shot up its tankers, and Kevin Hart is about to get absolutely roasted live on Netflix. Gas is $4.52 a gallon and the stock market somehow hit new all-time highs anyway.
